<div class="autornaseq-welcome">
  <section class="welcome-hero">
    <div class="welcome-badge">AI-Powered Transcriptomics Platform</div>
    <h1>Welcome to AutoRNAseq</h1>
    <p class="welcome-subtitle">Start here to move from raw sequencing files to quality control, differential expression, pathway analysis, and machine-learning biomarker discovery in one guided workflow.</p>
    <div class="welcome-hero-points">
      <span>1-click guided navigation</span>
      <span>Reproducible analysis flow</span>
      <span>Publication-ready outputs</span>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="welcome-grid">
    <article class="welcome-card">
      <h3>Step 1: Data Setup</h3>
      <p>Use the <strong>Data Setup</strong> module first to import FASTQ files and sample metadata. This is the foundation for every downstream step.</p>
    </article>
    <article class="welcome-card">
      <h3>Step 2: Review Quality</h3>
      <p>Run <strong>Quality Control</strong> and <strong>Filtering &amp; Trimming</strong> before alignment so low-quality reads do not affect the results.</p>
    </article>
    <article class="welcome-card">
      <h3>Step 3: Interpret Biology</h3>
      <p>Use <strong>Differential Expression</strong>, <strong>GO/KEGG/GSEA</strong>, <strong>PPI</strong>, and <strong>ML Biomarkers</strong> to turn counts into biological insight.</p>
    </article>
  </section>

  <section class="welcome-flow">
    <h2>Recommended Path</h2>
    <div class="welcome-steps">
      <div class="step">1. Data Setup</div>
      <div class="step">2. Quality Control</div>
      <div class="step">3. Filtering &amp; Trimming</div>
      <div class="step">4. Alignment</div>
      <div class="step">5. Quantification</div>
      <div class="step">6. Differential Expression</div>
      <div class="step">7. GO / KEGG / GSEA</div>
      <div class="step">8. PPI / ML Biomarkers</div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="welcome-tools">
    <h2>What AutoRNAseq Handles for You</h2>
    <p>The platform bundles read QC, trimming, alignment, quantification, DEG analysis, functional enrichment, interaction networks, and biomarker ranking into one continuous experience.</p>
  </section>

  <section class="welcome-start">
    <h2>Best First Move</h2>
    <ol>
      <li>Open <strong>Data Setup</strong> from the sidebar.</li>
      <li>Upload your FASTQ files and metadata CSV.</li>
      <li>Proceed through the modules in order for the smoothest experience.</li>
    </ol>
  </section>
</div>
